name: skillsets
description: Personal collection of model-agnostic engineering and research skills for Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Antigravity, and Hermes.

interface.longDescription: A personal collection of model-agnostic engineering and research skills. Each skill is a self-contained, disciplined workflow covering Android offensive security and forensics, software architecture, UI/UX and frontend, data architecture, Linux device drivers, real-time and dataplane systems, technology leadership, and academic research. Compatible with Hermes, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Antigravity (Gemini).
